question: Modify the `Book` class constructor to use an initializer list to initialize its private members (`title`, `author`, `isbn`). Explain why initializer lists are often preferred.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, ISBN: 978-0345391803
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, ISBN: 978-0451524935

errors: The 'title' member is declared as 'const' and must be initialized in the constructor's initializer list. Attempting to assign to it in the constructor body is a semantic error, as it's already constructed (or attempted to be default-constructed and then assigned).
